title: Trending bedroom updates
description: PROPERTY NEWS - As we move into longer days,...
bodyText:
PROPERTY NEWS - As we move into longer days, softer light, and a fresh sense of energy, it’s the perfect time to swap out heavier winter décor for airy, uplifting updates.

This season’s trends lean into calm, cosy minimalism with playful touches that celebrate both comfort and personality.


> Here are the top spring bedroom updates to inspire your refresh:


1. Light, airy beddingSpring bedding is all about layering lighter fabrics in breathable textures. Think linen duvet covers, organic cotton sheets, and waffle blankets in soft neutrals or muted pastels. Crisp whites paired with sage green or blush pink instantly brighten the room.

2. Pops of botanical printsFlorals in the bedroom aren’t just for your grandma’s wallpaper anymore. This season’s botanical prints are subtle and modern – appearing on throw pillows, framed prints, or even as a statement wallpaper accent wall. They bring the outdoors in while keeping a contemporary feel.

3. Natural wood accentsSpring 2025 leans heavily into nature-inspired décor. Wooden side tables, rattan headboards, or bamboo storage baskets add warmth and texture. Mixing lighter oak with woven details feels effortless and seasonal.

4. Fresh colour palettesSpring bedrooms are moving beyond basic pastels. Trending colors include soft lilac, muted terracotta, and butter yellow—all of which feel cheerful but grounded. Pairing these with creamy neutrals keeps the palette sophisticated.

5. Sheer curtains for soft lightSay goodbye to heavy winter drapes. Swap them out for sheer, flowing curtains that let in natural light while adding a dreamy softness to your room. This simple switch instantly changes the atmosphere of your bedroom.

6. Layered rugsSpring is the season to experiment with texture. A light jute rug layered with a smaller patterned or tufted rug adds dimension without feeling heavy. It’s a grounding way to bring coziness without warmth overload.

7. Seasonal greeneryPlants are always in style, but this spring is about playful displays. Think hanging planters, trailing vines on bookshelves, or a tall statement plant in a woven basket. They freshen the air and visually liven up your room.

8. Decluttered, calm spacesSpring cleaning and bedroom updates go hand in hand. Minimalist nightstands, hidden storage baskets, and intentional styling create a sense of calm—an essential for a restful sleep environment.

Spring is about creating a bedroom that feels lighter, fresher, and more intentional. With simple swaps – like breathable fabrics, natural textures, and a pop of botanical charm – you can completely transform your space into a sanctuary that mirrors the season of growth and renewal.

Article: Caxton Network News
